message:
feat(freeze): Add check_var opcode Zig support

Convert check_var opcode to support both C and Zig output.
This opcode checks if a global variable exists.

Stack effect: [] -> [boolean] (pushes 1)

Implementation:
- Gets global object
- Creates atom from variable name
- Checks if property exists using JS_HasProperty
- Frees atom and global references
- Pushes boolean result (true if exists, false otherwise)
- Handles empty/out-of-bounds atoms by pushing FALSE
- In Zig: uses qjs. prefix for all functions
- In C: uses standard QuickJS API
